name: Enemies from the Past
overview: Go Ya supports her family by doing part-time work. Her father had an affair and left home 10 years ago. She is now looking for a regular full-time job. Ji Seok is a lawyer who specializes in divorces. He is skeptical about marriage, but after he meets Go Ya and gets close to her, they face a difficult situation.

trailers.title: [Teaser] 전생에 웬수들 - 11월 27일 첫방송 일일연속극 전생에 웬수들
